name: Occultic Daily Life, Okarun
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, if you have another 《Human》 or 《Strange》 character, this card gets +1 level and +3500 power until end of turn.【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 [Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card attacks, if "Occult Lurking in Everyday Life" is in your climax area, you may pay the cost. If you do, perform the following action 2 times. "Look at up to 3 cards from the top of your deck, choose up to 1 "Sacred Ball!?" or 《Human》 or 《Strange》 character from among them, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and put the rest into your waiting room."
flavor_text: I guess I have no choice, so that's fine.

name: Full Throttle Strike, Okarun
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand or by "Fusion", draw up to 2 cards, choose 2 cards in your hand, put them into your waiting room, and put up to 1 card from the top of your deck into your stock.【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 [(4) Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] At the end of this card's attack, if "World of Occult" is in your climax area, you may pay the cost. If you do, put all markers underneath this card into your waiting room, choose 1 "Tenacious Pursuit, Okarun" or "Full Throttle Pursuit, Okarun" in your waiting room, put it in the stage position that this card is in, put this card face up underneath that character as a marker, and at the end of the turn, exchange those characters.
flavor_text: Man, I hate this. I wanna go home…

ability: 【AUTO】 [(1) Put the top card of your deck into your clock] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, search your deck for up to 1 level 1 or lower character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavor_text: I don't know. But it sounded like an explosion.
